Now let me mark the task as done, commit, and push.Created `src/server.ts` — internal HTTP server with POST `/api/send` endpoint for Maestro-to-Discord CLI messaging.

**Implementation details:**
- `parseBody()` — streams request body with 1MB size limit, parses JSON
- `findOrCreateChannel()` — looks up existing agent channel via DB, or auto-creates one using the same category/channel pattern from `agents.ts`
- `handleSend()` — validates Content-Type, request fields, resolves channel, builds message (with optional @mentions), splits via `splitMessage()`, sends with 3-attempt retry on rate limits
- `startServer()` — creates `http.createServer`, routes only `POST /api/send` (404 for other paths, 405 for wrong method), binds to `127.0.0.1` on `config.apiPort`
- TypeScript compilation passes cleanly
